title: Specify plan.yaml
description: Validates the structure of `.specify/plan.yaml`: the initiative name, the optional named-sources map, and the ordered list of plan changes with their dependencies, status, and per-source scope. Strict schema — unknown fields are rejected. Written by `specify initiative {init,create,amend,transition,archive}`; read by `/spec:execute` and by humans driving the Layer 1 loop. See RFC-3a §*Large-Monolith Decomposition* for the `scope` field's semantics and the manifest escape hatch.

name.description: Initiative name. Kebab-case; becomes the archive filename prefix.

sources.description: Named source repositories. Keys are kebab-case identifiers referenced by each change's `sources` list; values are paths or URLs. Parsed and validated in Layer 1; resolved to define-step arguments in Layer 2.

changes.description: Ordered list of plan changes. Order is the tie-breaker for `specify initiative next` when multiple entries are eligible.

kebabName.description: Kebab-case identifier: lowercase letters and digits grouped by single internal hyphens; no leading, trailing, or consecutive hyphens. Matches `specify_change::actions::validate_name`.

scopeEntry.description: One source's scope under `planChange.scope`. Either `include`/`exclude` glob lists OR a `manifest` pointer — the two forms are mutually exclusive for a given source key. Empty object is valid and semantically equivalent to omitting the entry. See RFC-3a §*The `scope` field* (globs) and §*Manifest shape* (enumerated file lists).

include.description: Gitignore-style glob patterns, resolved relative to the source's path, selecting which files `/spec:extract` reads for business-logic extraction. Sentinel manifest / lockfile discovery is unaffected (see RFC-3a §*Sentinels always read*).

exclude.description: Gitignore-style glob patterns subtracted from the include set (or from the full source tree when `include` is absent). Cannot hide sentinel files.

manifest.description: Escape-hatch pointer to a per-slice manifest file (typically `.specify/plans/<initiative>/slices/<change>.yaml`) enumerating files explicitly. Mutually exclusive with `include`/`exclude` for this source key.

name.description: Change name. Unique across the plan; becomes the Specify change directory name when the entry transitions to `in-progress`.

status.description: Current state in the plan status state machine.

depends-on.description: Change names that must be `done` before this change is eligible. Consumed by `specify initiative next`.

affects.description: Change names whose merged behaviour this change modifies. Impact annotation only in Layer 1; used for delta targeting in Layer 2.

sources.description: Keys into the plan's top-level `sources` map indicating which source repositories to analyze. Absent or `[]` → greenfield.

scope.description: Per-source scope narrowing `/spec:extract`'s view of each source. Keys are kebab-case source names drawn from this change's `sources` list (cross-key referential integrity is enforced by `specify initiative validate`, not by this schema). A source absent from `scope` hands the whole source tree to extract — the back-compat path. See RFC-3a §*The `scope` field* and §*Manifest shape*.

description.description: Free-text scoping hint for the define step. Distinct from the operational `status-reason` below.

status-reason.description: Why the change is `failed`/`blocked`/`skipped`. Overwritten on each status transition; cleared when re-entering `pending`/`in-progress`/`done`.
